  1. com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap

Uses of Package
com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap

Packages that use com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap
Package
Description
com.zendesk.maxwell
top level classes concerned with instantiating and running a Maxwell replicator.
com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap
bootstrapping outputs the current dataset into a stream.
com.zendesk.maxwell.replication
concerns the operation of the binlog replicator
  • Classes in com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap used by com.zendesk.maxwell
    Class
    Description
    BootstrapController
    Watches maxwell.bootstrap, starts and stops bootstrap tasks
  • Classes in com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap used by com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap
    Class
    Description
    BootstrapTask
    The BootstrapTask class represents a task for bootstrapping a database table and provides methods for creating, manipulating, and matching tasks.
    SynchronousBootstrapper
    Does the bulk of the actual bootstrapping work
  • Classes in com.zendesk.maxwell.bootstrap used by com.zendesk.maxwell.replication
    Class
    Description
    BootstrapController
    Watches maxwell.bootstrap, starts and stops bootstrap tasks
